title: Catalog Search For Buyer Agents
purpose: Help the agent find public ItPay services without login and without expensive repeated full searches.
when_to_use: The user describes a need but has not chosen a service.
The agent needs product and variant details before recommendation.
The agent needs to search the CORE-028 PUBG sandbox catalog pack.

commands.intent: search public catalog by natural language query
commands.command: itp buyer catalog search --query "吃鸡 情侣皮肤" --json
commands.success_signal: response.products contains variants with id, title, price, metadata

commands.intent: get exact product details for a selected variant
discover low-cost shelf sync endpoints for repeated reads

agent_rules: Full search is allowed for explicit user search, not as a polling loop.
For repeated discovery, prefer shelf manifest/snapshot/delta.
Use product and variant metadata to explain options in user language.
Do not create checkout until the user intent maps to one selected variant.
forbidden: Do not require login for discovery.
Do not invent catalog items or variant IDs.
Do not assume search result order means the user has approved purchase.

next_docs.condition: The user has chosen a variant
